blended.narrative: Mt. Baker is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,007 ft. Looking ahead, 34 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 33.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 17" over the past week. Current depth: 87".
